headline: WPP Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: WPP (NYSE:WPP) reported a first-quarter trading update that showed continued top-line pressure but a modest sequential improvement from late 2025, as management pointed to stabilizing actions under its newly launched Elevate 28 strategy and strengthening net new business momentum. Q1 results: Reven

headline: Do Wall Street Analysts Like Norwegian Cruise Line Stock?
summary: Norwegian Cruise Line has underperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts remain cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.
